events.title: 20th International Clinical Oncology Congress
events.subtitle: International Clinical Oncology Congress — Tehran, July 2026
events.excerpt: The 20th International Clinical Oncology Congress hosted by the Iranian Society of Radiation Oncology at Heart Hotel, Rajaei Cardiovascular Institute, Tehran — 2–3 July 2026.

events.title: Symposium on Nanomedicine and its Impact on the Central Nervous System
events.subtitle: Introduction of The Textbook of Nanoneuroscience and Nanoneurosurgery (2nd Edition)
events.venue: Shahid Beheshti University of Medical Sciences
events.excerpt: An academic symposium on nanomedicine applications in the central nervous system, featuring the unveiling of the second edition of the leading nanoneuroscience textbook.
